description: Module change confirmed — adding Newsletter; £39 charged

values.paymentLine: Your card was charged £39 for the Newsletter setup fee. You'll see it on your statement as MODUFORGE.

expected.subject: Module change confirmed ✓
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Your module change is live.

What changed:
  • Added: Newsletter
  • Removed: (none)

Payment:
  • Your card was charged £39 for the Newsletter setup fee. You'll see it on your statement as MODUFORGE.

Your new totals:
  • Setup fee: £246
  • Monthly: £31/month

Any new module cards are now visible on your hub — head over and
finish their setup. Any modules you removed are hidden, but your
data is preserved if you ever re-add them.

Note: this was your one allowed pre-launch module change. Anything
else needs to wait until after launch (post-launch monthly
allowance) or be quoted separately.

Thanks,
Ben (and the ModuForge ops assistant)
